demo.title: splits-treasury.sh
demo.code:
# Give a Bankr agent governed access to Splits Treasury
# Placeholders (<...>) are illustrative — replace with real values; do not run as-is.
splits auth create-key --register --name "Bankr Agent"
splits accounts update-signers <TREASURY_ADDRESS> --addEoaSignerIds <AGENT_SIGNER_ID> --memo "Add Bankr agent signer"

# Review balances and propose an expense payment
splits accounts balances <TREASURY_ADDRESS> --chainIds 1,8453
splits transactions create transfer --account <TREASURY_ADDRESS> --chainId 8453 --recipient <VENDOR_ADDRESS> --token <USDC_ADDRESS> --amount "1000" --memo "Vendor payment INV-123"

setup: Create a Splits API key in the web app (needs a Splits team): https://teams.splits.org/settings/team/api-keys/
Register agent signer: `splits auth create-key --register --name "Bankr Agent"`
Create a bounded agent subaccount, or have a human approve agent signer access on an existing account
